message:
feat(harness): add oracle preflight doctor, differential metadata schema, artifact-bundle integrity, SLT ingestion, and parity report versioning

Major harness infrastructure expansion for the bd-2yqp6 track:

oracle_preflight_doctor (bd-2yqp6.2.5): New pre-flight readiness check
that validates sqlite3 binary presence, version match against the
canonical contract, fixture directory health, and corpus-manifest
consistency before differential/parity lanes run. Produces red/yellow/
green severity diagnostics with actionable remediation commands.

differential_v2: Add TARGET_SQLITE_VERSION and SQLITE_VERSION_CONTRACT_PATH
constants. Embed scenario_id in execution envelopes and canonical hash.
Add DifferentialMetadata schema contract with trace_id, timing, oracle
identity, fixture_manifest_hash, normalized_outcome, and first-failure
reference. Add DIFFERENTIAL_METADATA_SCHEMA_VERSION for schema evolution.

corpus_ingest: Add ingest_conformance_fixtures_with_report returning
FixtureIngestReport with per-file skip reasons, statement counts, and
ingestion stats. Add ingest_slt_files_with_report for SQLLogicTest file
ingestion. Improve JSON fixture parsing robustness with explicit
serde_json::Value access patterns.

validation_manifest: Add ArtifactBundleIntegrityReport with deterministic
SHA-256 signing over canonical payload. Add ArtifactHashRatchetBaseline
and ArtifactHashRatchetDecision types for bd-2yqp6.2.9. Wire integrity
report into ValidationManifestBundle and validate at build time.

differential_manifest_runner: Add SLT ingestion support, configurable
minimum fixture/SLT thresholds, and fixture ingest report propagation.
Resolve fixtures dir relative to workspace root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
